クラス CapabilityProfiler

java.lang.Object
mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfiler
public class CapabilityProfiler extends Object
Derives capability scores for each character in a party by running controlled simulation experiments.

Seven experiment templates are run per character:

  • A — full on-field presence: measures raw on-field DPS
  • B — passive presence: measures off-field damage after skill+burst
  • C — team with subject buffing: measures buff contribution
  • D — team without subject buffing: baseline for buff measurement
  • E — self with burst: measures self-enhanced DPS
  • F — self without burst: baseline for self-enhancement measurement
  • G — energy counting: measures ER-scaled particles per skill use

Results are written to a JSON file loadable by ObservationEncoder.

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    private CharacterActionRequest
    chooseBestAction(CombatSimulator sim, CharacterId subjectId, boolean allowBurst, boolean allowSkill)
    Chooses the best action for the subject: burst (if allowed and ready), then skill (if allowed and ready), then normal attack.
    private static double
    clamp01(double v)
     
    private CombatSimulator
    createFilledSim()
    Creates a fresh simulator with all characters' energy filled to burst cost.
    private void
    fillWithNormals(CombatSimulator sim, CharacterId id, double limit)
    Has the given character perform normal attacks until the episode limit is reached.
    private static String
    format(double v)
     
    private CharacterId
    getDummyAttacker(CharacterId subjectId)
    Returns the fixed dummy attacker for Template B, preferring partyOrder[0] when possible.
    private CharacterId
    getFixedPrimaryAttacker()
    Returns the fixed primary attacker for templates C/D: partyOrder[0].
    private double
    getMaxEnergyCost()
     
    Map<CharacterId, double[]>
    getResults()
     
    private static double
    mean(double[] values)
     
    private double[]
    profileCharacter(CharacterId subjectId)
     
    void
    runAll()
    Runs all templates for every character in EpisodeConfig.partyOrder.
    private double
    runQuietly(CapabilityProfiler.TemplateRun run)
     
    private double
    runTemplateA(CharacterId subjectId)
    Template A: subject on field for full episode, uses skill/burst whenever available.
    private double
    runTemplateB(CharacterId subjectId, CharacterId dummyId)
    Template B: subject uses skill+burst at t=0, swaps off.
    private double
    runTemplateC(CharacterId subjectId, CharacterId primaryId)
    Template C: subject uses skill+burst at t=0, then primary attacks for a full 20-second window.
    private double
    runTemplateD(CharacterId primaryId)
    Template D: same as C but subject does nothing.
    private double
    runTemplateE(CharacterId subjectId)
    Template E: subject on field for full episode, uses burst at t=0, then ATTACKs only.
    private double
    runTemplateF(CharacterId subjectId)
    Template F: subject on field for full episode, never uses burst, only skill+attack.
    private double
    runTemplateG(CharacterId subjectId)
    Template G: subject uses skill once (from fresh sim with 0 energy), then idles 5s.
    private static double
    stddev(double[] values)
     
    private void
    useBurstIfReady(CombatSimulator sim, CharacterId id)
     
    private void
    useSkillIfReady(CombatSimulator sim, CharacterId id)
     
    void
    writeJson(String path)
    Writes the profiling results to a JSON file.
    static void
    writeJson(String path, Map<CharacterId, double[]> sourceResults)

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • CapabilityProfiler

      public CapabilityProfiler(Supplier<CombatSimulator> simulatorSupplier, EpisodeConfig config)

  • メソッドの詳細

    • runAll

      public void runAll()
      Runs all templates for every character in EpisodeConfig.partyOrder. Results are stored internally and can be written via writeJson(String).

    • writeJson

      public void writeJson(String path) throws IOException
      Writes the profiling results to a JSON file.
      パラメータ:
      path - destination file path (parent directories must exist)
      例外:
      IOException - if the file cannot be written

    • getResults

      public Map<CharacterId, double[]> getResults()

    • writeJson

      public static void writeJson(String path, Map<CharacterId, double[]> sourceResults) throws IOException
      例外:
      IOException

    • profileCharacter

      private double[] profileCharacter(CharacterId subjectId)

    • runTemplateA

      private double runTemplateA(CharacterId subjectId)
      Template A: subject on field for full episode, uses skill/burst whenever available.

    • runTemplateB

      private double runTemplateB(CharacterId subjectId, CharacterId dummyId)
      Template B: subject uses skill+burst at t=0, swaps off. Dummy attacker fills the next 20 seconds. Records only the subject's off-field damage after the swap.

    • runTemplateC

      private double runTemplateC(CharacterId subjectId, CharacterId primaryId)
      Template C: subject uses skill+burst at t=0, then primary attacks for a full 20-second window. Records only the primary's damage during that post-setup window.

    • runTemplateD

      private double runTemplateD(CharacterId primaryId)
      Template D: same as C but subject does nothing. Records only the primary's damage during its 20-second attack window.

    • runTemplateE

      private double runTemplateE(CharacterId subjectId)
      Template E: subject on field for full episode, uses burst at t=0, then ATTACKs only.

    • runTemplateF

      private double runTemplateF(CharacterId subjectId)
      Template F: subject on field for full episode, never uses burst, only skill+attack.

    • runTemplateG

      private double runTemplateG(CharacterId subjectId)
      Template G: subject uses skill once (from fresh sim with 0 energy), then idles 5s. Records ER-scaled particle energy received.

    • createFilledSim

      private CombatSimulator createFilledSim()
      Creates a fresh simulator with all characters' energy filled to burst cost.

    • getFixedPrimaryAttacker

      private CharacterId getFixedPrimaryAttacker()
      Returns the fixed primary attacker for templates C/D: partyOrder[0].

    • getDummyAttacker

      private CharacterId getDummyAttacker(CharacterId subjectId)
      Returns the fixed dummy attacker for Template B, preferring partyOrder[0] when possible.

    • runQuietly

      private double runQuietly(CapabilityProfiler.TemplateRun run)

    • chooseBestAction

      private CharacterActionRequest chooseBestAction(CombatSimulator sim, CharacterId subjectId, boolean allowBurst, boolean allowSkill)
      Chooses the best action for the subject: burst (if allowed and ready), then skill (if allowed and ready), then normal attack.

    • useSkillIfReady

      private void useSkillIfReady(CombatSimulator sim, CharacterId id)

    • useBurstIfReady

      private void useBurstIfReady(CombatSimulator sim, CharacterId id)

    • fillWithNormals

      private void fillWithNormals(CombatSimulator sim, CharacterId id, double limit)
      Has the given character perform normal attacks until the episode limit is reached.

    • getMaxEnergyCost

      private double getMaxEnergyCost()

    • mean

      private static double mean(double[] values)

    • stddev

      private static double stddev(double[] values)

    • clamp01

      private static double clamp01(double v)

    • format
